raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Red Sticker program for off-highway vehicles in California has allowed these vehicles to operate for the past two decades.",
    "The Red Sticker program is set to end in 2021 with no replacement plan from the California Air Resources Board.",
    "Without a new program, off-highway vehicle competitions and practice riding on public lands will be terminated in California, negatively impacting local businesses and manufacturers.",
    "Senate Bill 1024 creates a Competition Sticker program to replace the Red Sticker program.",
    "SB 1024 has been crafted in collaboration with various stakeholders, including government agencies and the off-highway vehicle community."
  ]
}
```
